name: Caramel-Chocolate Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle pecan pieces evenly in the unbaked pastry shell.
2. Sprinkle chocolate pieces and drizzle caramel topping over the pecans.
3. In a medium mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sour cream, sugar, and vanilla.
4. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
5. Add eggs, beating on low speed just until combined.
6. Pour the mixture over the caramel topping in the crust.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for about 45 minutes or until the center appears set.
8. Cool on a wire rack. Cover and chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
9. Sift cocoa powder over pie, if desired.
Nutrition information per serving: 640 cal., 44 g fat, 123 mg chol., 10 g pro., 57 g carbo., 2 g fiber, 243 mg sodium. RDA: 11 percent calcium, 15 percent iron.
